ceb.Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Scotlan: Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Scotland, United Kingdom

zh.Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Scotlan: 英國蘇格蘭希倫德波奧利波奧利 普利奧利
zh.Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, United Ki: 英國蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail於1483年出生在英國蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾時，他的父親Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintail29歲，母親Agnes-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, latterly Kintail27歲。他於1506年與Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1561年6月6日在蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾享年78歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭希倫德波奧利波奧利 普利奧利。

zh-hans.Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Scotlan: 英国苏格兰希倫德波奧利波奧利 普利奧利
zh-hans.Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, United Ki: 英国苏格兰洛-爾金泰爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail于1483年出生在英国苏格兰洛-爾金泰爾时，他的父亲Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintail29岁，母亲Agnes-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, latterly Kintail27岁。他于1506年与Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail在苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1561年6月6日在苏格兰洛-爾金泰爾享年78岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰希倫德波奧利波奧利 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Mackenzie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kinsey
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Kynsey (Old English Cynesige from cyne- ‘royal’ + sige ‘victory’).
Possibly also an Americanized form of Swiss German Künzi (see Kuenzi ).

History: The paternal grandfather of NJ and PA legislator John Kinsey (1693–1750) was one of the commissioners sent out from England in 1677 by the West Jersey proprietors to buy land from the Indians and to lay out a town. John was the leader of the Quaker party in the PA assembly and chief justice of the PA supreme court.

variants.name: McKenzie
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinnich, a patronymic from the personal name Coinneach meaning ‘comely’, Anglicized as Kenneth. Compare the Irish form McKinney 2. The Scottish spelling with -z- indicates palatalization of the -n- (compare Menzies ).

History: This is the name of a Scottish Highland clan, historically associated with the mountainous district of Kintail in nortwestern Scotland, with Cromarty, and with Loch Seaforth (Loch Shiphoirt) on the Island of Harris.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Iain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail was born in 1483, in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintail, was 29 and his mother, Agnes-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, latterly Kintail, was 27. He married Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail in 1506, in Cromartyshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 6 June 1561, in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, at the age of 78, and was buried in Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Scotlan: Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail est né en 1483, à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintail, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, latterly Kintail, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail en 1506, à Cromartyshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 6 juin 1561, à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Scotlan: Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail 1483 in Kintail, Ross-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintail 29 und seine Mutter Agnes-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, latterly Kintail 27. Er hat 1506 in Cromartyshire, Scotland Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 6. Juni 1561 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland und wurde in Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail è nato il nel 1483 nel Kintail, Ross-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintail, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Agnes-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, latterly Kintail, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail nel 1506, nel Cromartyshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ja.lifeSummary: John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintailが1483年にイギリススコットランドロス-シュアイアキンティイルで生まれた時，父Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintailは29歳，母Agnes-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, latterly Kintailは27歳であった。1506年にスコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアでElizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintailと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1561年6月6日にスコットランドロス-シュアイアキンティイルで78歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドヒグhランドビーウリービーウリー プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Scotlan: 영국 스코틀랜드 히랜드 보리 보리 플리오리
ko.lifeSummary: John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail(이)가 1483년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintail(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, latterly Kintail(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1506년 스컷랜드 크로마티실르에서 Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1561년 6월 6일 스컷랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 히랜드 보리 보리 플리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail nasceu em 1483, em Kintail, Ross-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintail, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, latterly Kintail, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail em 1506, em Cromartyshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 6 de junho de 1561, em Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Scotlan: болы приори, болы, хаиланд, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail родился в 1483 г. в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintail было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, latterly Kintail, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail в 1506 г. в местности кромертишир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 6 июня 1561 г. в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности болы приори, болы, хаиланд, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail nació en 1483, en Kintail, Ross-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Kenneth Mackenzie 7th of Kintail, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Agnes-nic-Hugh Fraser of Lovat, latterly Kintail, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail en 1506, en Cromartyshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 6 de junio de 1561, en Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Beauly Priory, Beauly, Highland, Escocia, Reino Unido.
